extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked with 6.5km to go on Alpe Motta's 10% gradient, extended advantage late while BERNAL was dropped by ALMEIDA inside final 500m but limited losses to 30 seconds.
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange controlled break gap to maximum 4.5 minutes from 70km out, enabling team leader stage hunting without GC threat.
BERNAL dropped by domestique ALMEIDA final 500m signals vulnerability even when saving podium, concerning for remaining mountain stages.
Split on descent with 70km remaining caused INEOS to burn GANNA domestique early, depleting support before decisive final climb.
YATES attacked with 6.5km on 10% gradient rather than waiting for steeper sections, exploiting sustained gradient over explosive finish.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: dropped by own domestique Almeida in final 500m suggests deeper weakness than GC defense narrative implies
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: positive: stronger than maglia rosa in finale while working as domestique, repositioning as potential podium threat
rider_signals.MCCARTHY Jay: negative: dropped from chase group on 10% gradient, confirming altitude/steep gradient limitation for top-10 ambitions
rider_signals.VLASSOV Aleksandr: neutral: had to chase back to group after difficulty, maintaining 4th at 7:10 but showing no offensive capacity
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: cut 30+ seconds from Bernal with sustained 6.5km effort rather than explosive attack, potentially more dangerous over multi-climb stage
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: followed initial Yates attack and limited losses to 20 seconds, maintaining podium proximity at 2:29
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Daniel: positive: proved most valuable INEOS domestique by recovering from split and pacing Bernal on final climb after others failed
